title: OpenClaw Discord slash commands should not acknowledge with Done while dropping the real response

source.license_note: Synthetic ops scenario derived from openclaw/openclaw issue #53416.

task.summary: Diagnose why native slash commands acknowledge with Done but do not deliver their actual response content.
task.instructions: Use the interaction evidence to confirm the Done-without-content failure, localize it to the native command dispatch path, and propose an ops-level repair plan that restores slash-command responses.
task.acceptance_notes: This GitHub-derived ops scenario is synthetic and graded behaviorally.

visible_context.issue_text: After the Carbon reconcile migration, native Discord slash commands return `✅ Done` but never send their real output.
error_logs: slash command acknowledged but no follow-up content was sent
reproduction_steps: Explain where the dispatch path loses the actual command response.
visible_context.notes: This fixture models the interaction dispatch failure around native Discord commands.

ops_fault.description: Synthetic Discord slash-command incident derived from the GitHub issue.

notes: Synthetic ops scenario derived from openclaw/openclaw issue #53416.
